text:
Created attachment 153145
sysutils/ansible 1.8.2_3 -> 1.8.3

Please update sysutils/ansible to 1.8.3.
This version contains many bugfixes and a small security fix for ansible-vault.
Changes: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ansible/ansible/v1.8.3/CHANGELOG.md
